case_for: Cooper has shown top-end ceiling this season, including a 27.6-point explosion in week 3, proving he can single-handedly clear the threshold when targets come his way.
case_against: Outside that one outlier game, Cooper has been consistently below the 12-point threshold (averaging roughly 6.7 pts in the other five games), and the pregame projection of 8.2 pts reflects that modest recent baseline.
